description: EDR_T3 ESM Step 4 image-quality threshold A/B — band registration breakdown
dataset: EDR_T3, 522 re-encoded TIFFs, Metashape 2.3.1 build 22446, L4 GPU
decision_rule: keep arm that aligns comparably with more coverage; floor wins if 0.50 shows no benefit
mechanism_overlap_collapse: The >=0.50 frames aligned 140/280 in q050 (band disabled) but 280/280 in q030 (band enabled). Including the 0.30-0.50 band did not merely add frames; it RESCUED alignment of the >=0.50 frames by restoring image-network overlap. The 0.30-0.50 band itself registers at 99.2% (235/237) in q030 — fully usable.
decision: Adopt floor cut (disable < 0.30). Toth's verbatim 0.50 over-cuts our re-encoded TIFFs (26.8% aligned vs 98.7%).
